# Qiniu Go SDK — GitHub Copilot Instructions

## Project

Qiniu Cloud Go SDK (`github.com/qiniu/go-sdk/v7`). Go 1.22+, MIT License.

Provides Go clients for Qiniu Cloud services: object storage, CDN, live streaming (Pili), RTC, SMS, IoT (Linking), IAM, media processing, audit, and sandbox.

## Key Packages

- `auth` — Authentication (AK/SK, signatures, tokens); supports `auth.WithCredentialsType()` / `auth.CredentialsFromContext()` for Context-based credential passing
- `storage` — Object storage v1; uses Manager pattern (`BucketManager`, `OperationManager`, `UploadManager`)
- `storagev2` — Object storage v2; uses Provider/Interface pattern (`CredentialsProvider`, `RegionsProvider`, `EndpointsProvider`)
- `cdn` — CDN acceleration
- `pili` — Live streaming
- `qvs` — Video surveillance
- `rtc` — Real-time communication
- `sms` — SMS service
- `linking` — IoT device linking
- `iam` — Identity and access management (generated APIs)
- `media` — Media processing (generated APIs)
- `audit` — Audit logging (generated APIs)
- `sandbox` — Sandbox service (oapi-codegen + ConnectRPC generated)
- `internal/clientv2` — HTTP client with interceptor chain (`Interceptor` interface: `Priority()` + `Intercept(req, handler)`)

## Code Generation

Files marked `// THIS FILE IS GENERATED BY api-generator, DO NOT EDIT DIRECTLY!` are auto-generated.

- `storagev2/apis/`, `iam/apis/`, `media/apis/`, `audit/apis/` — generated by `internal/api-generator/` from YAML specs in `api-specs/`
- `sandbox/internal/` — generated by `oapi-codegen` and `buf`/`protoc`
- Regenerate with: `make generate` or `make generate-sandbox`

## Coding Conventions

- Format: `gofmt -s` (CI enforced)
- Static analysis: `staticcheck` (CI enforced)
- Comments: Chinese by default; all exports must have doc comments starting with identifier name
- Constructors: `New*()` or `New*Ex()` (Ex = extended version)
- Error types: root `QError` (Code + Message) in `err.go`; typed errors in `storagev2/errors`
- Tests: `//go:build unit` for unit tests, `//go:build integration` for integration tests
- Test framework: standard `testing` + `testify/assert`; mock via custom struct implementing interfaces; prefer table-driven tests

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `make unittest` | Run unit tests |
| `make integrationtest` | Run integration tests |
| `make test` | Run all tests |
| `make staticcheck` | Run static analysis |
| `make generate` | Regenerate API code |
| `make generate-sandbox` | Regenerate sandbox code |

## Critical Rules

1. Never edit files marked `DO NOT EDIT DIRECTLY` — modify API specs then `make generate`
2. Run `make unittest` and `make staticcheck` before committing
3. Don't delete code in `sms/` or `examples/` directories
4. Version sync: `conf/conf.go`, `README.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`
5. `api-specs/` is a git submodule — init with `git submodule update --init --recursive`
